appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.launchAtStartupDesc: Automatically launch 极智 when you log in

neutralColor.title: Neutral Color
neutralColor.desc: Custom grayscale with different color tendencies

translucentSidebar.title: Translucent Sidebar
translucentSidebar.desc: Enable a token-driven frosted sidebar surface that works with system materials

animationMode.title: Response Animation
animationMode.desc: Adjust the animation intensity used across the application

contextMenuMode.title: Right-Click Menu Mode
contextMenuMode.desc: Enable the right-click menu for some list items.

responseLanguage.title: Reply Language
responseLanguage.desc: Set the language used for AI replies

autoScroll.title: Auto-scroll During AI Response
autoScroll.desc: Automatically keep the latest streaming reply in view

voicePet.title: Voice & Pet
voicePet.description: Manage the floating pet, Volcengine ASR, and voice chat in one place.

pet.title: Floating Pet
pet.description: Show a transparent floating pet window with right-click animation switching.
pet.tip: When enabled, a separate floating window appears. You can also right-click the pet to switch animations or hide it.

speech.title: Volcengine ASR
speech.description: The floating pet streams microphone audio to Volcengine realtime ASR and sends recognized text directly into Code Chat.
speech.appIdPlaceholder: Enter your Volcengine speech App ID
speech.tokenPlaceholder: Enter your Volcengine speech Access Token
speech.tokenSaved: Currently saved: {{token}}. Leave blank to keep the existing token.
speech.tokenHelp: The token stays on this device and is used by the Electron main process to connect to Volcengine WebSocket ASR.
speech.saveFailed: Failed to save Volcengine ASR config
speech.loadFailed: Failed to load Volcengine ASR config
speech.tip: After saving, press `F2` to start realtime voice-to-text.

voiceChat.title: Voice Chat
voiceChat.description: Configure the Volcengine end-to-end realtime voice settings used by the pet's dedicated voice dialog window. The main process uses the official fixed Resource ID and App Key.
voiceChat.appIdPlaceholder: Enter the APP ID from the Volcengine console
voiceChat.endpointPlaceholder: Enter the realtime voice WebSocket endpoint
voiceChat.endpointHelp: The recommended default endpoint is {{endpoint}}. A previously saved legacy endpoint can cause authentication failures.
voiceChat.accessKeyPlaceholder: Enter the Access Token from the console, or leave blank to reuse the ASR token
voiceChat.accessKeySaved: Current dedicated Access Token: {{token}}. Leave blank to keep the existing value.
voiceChat.accessKeyReused: Currently reusing the Volcengine ASR Access Token: {{token}}.
voiceChat.accessKeyHelp: The voice dialog connects through the main process, so the renderer never holds the Access Token directly. If Volcengine ASR is configured, this field can stay empty.
voiceChat.saveFailed: Failed to save Voice Chat config
voiceChat.loadFailed: Failed to load Voice Chat config
voiceChat.tip: After saving, open "Voice Chat" from the floating pet's context menu. The current preset uses a Doubao-style O2.0 voice session.

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Configure your AI model providers and API keys

overview.title: Provider Accounts
overview.description: A summary of the provider accounts and models currently configured.

empty.title: No providers configured
empty.desc: Add an AI provider to start using 极智

dialog.title: Add AI Provider
dialog.desc: Configure a new AI model provider
dialog.apiKeyConfigured: An API key is already stored for this provider.
dialog.apiKeyMissing: No API key is stored for this provider yet.
dialog.apiKeyStored: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.
dialog.replaceApiKeyHelp: Leave this field empty if you want to keep the currently stored API key.
dialog.codePlanPresetDesc: Code Plan uses https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/coding/v3 and model ark-code-latest. Do not use /api/v3 for Code Plan traffic.
dialog.fallbackModelIdsHelp: One model ID per line. These models use the current provider config before falling back to other providers.
dialog.noFallbackOptions: Add another provider first to use it as a fallback target.

toast.minimaxConflict: Cannot add both MiniMax (Global) and MiniMax (CN) providers.

oauth.loginPrompt: This provider requires signing in via your browser.
oauth.browserFlowUnavailable: Browser OAuth is not wired for this provider yet.
oauth.step2: Open the login page in your browser.
oauth.step3: Paste the code to approve access.

gateway.title: Gateway
gateway.autoStartDesc: Start Gateway when 极智 launches
gateway.proxyDesc: Route Electron and Gateway traffic through your local proxy client.
gateway.proxyServerHelp: The default proxy for all requests. Bare host:port values default to HTTP.
gateway.proxyHttpServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTP requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyHttpsServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTPS requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyAllServerHelp: Advanced fallback for SOCKS-capable clients and protocols such as Telegram. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyBypassHelp: Semicolon, comma, or newline separated hosts that should connect directly.
gateway.proxyRestartNote: Saving reapplies Electron networking and restarts the Gateway immediately. Regular Gateway restarts keep existing Telegram channel proxy values when proxy is disabled; save while disabled to clear them.
gateway.remoteDesc: When set, the local OpenClaw process will not start — 极智 connects directly to the remote gateway. Clear to restore local mode.
gateway.remoteActive: ⚠ Remote mode is active — the local OpenClaw process will not start
gateway.cloudDesc: Cloud-managed OpenClaw gateway status for the current user.

imageGen.title: Image Generation
imageGen.desc: Configure the OpenAI-compatible image generation API used by the Image Gen skill.
imageGen.urlHelp: OpenAI-compatible image generation API URL, e.g. https://aihub.gz4399.com/v1
imageGen.apiKeyHelp: API key for the image generation service

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Keep 极智 up to date

status.downloadedMac: v{{version}} has been downloaded and will replace the bundled app.asar after restart
status.check: Check for updates to get the latest features

updates.help: When auto-update is enabled, updates are downloaded and installed automatically.
updates.helpMac: On macOS, the app downloads a replacement app.asar and restarts to apply it. If a release changes native binaries or external resources, install the full package instead.

forceModal.belowMinimum: Your version is below the minimum supported version. Please update to continue.
forceModal.newVersion: A newer version is available. We recommend updating now for the latest fixes and features.

advanced.title: Advanced

transport.label: Gateway Transport Preference
transport.desc: Choose how renderer requests gateway RPC: WebSocket, HTTP proxy, or IPC fallback.

advanced.telemetryDesc: Allow providing anonymous basic usage data to improve 极智
advanced.resetDataDesc: Delete all configuration, API keys, and account data, then restart the app from scratch.
advanced.resetConfirmMsg: This will delete all provider configurations, API keys, and app settings. This action cannot be undone. The app will restart automatically.

developer.title: Developer
developer.consoleDesc: Access the native OpenClaw management interface
developer.consoleNote: Opens the Control UI with gateway token injected
developer.gatewayTokenDesc: Paste this into Control UI settings if prompted
developer.cliDesc: Copy a command to run OpenClaw without modifying PATH.
developer.doctorDesc: Run `openclaw doctor` and inspect the raw diagnostic output.
developer.doctorFixRunFailed: Failed to run OpenClaw doctor fix
developer.codeAgentDesc: Manage the experimental Emma-Alpha/claude-code sidecar and run local analysis tasks.
developer.codeAgentCliPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use bundled CLI
developer.codeAgentConfigDesc: Configure the Claude CLI invocation used by the local sidecar.
developer.codeAgentConfigAutoMapHint: Leave model, base URL, or API key empty to try the app's isolated Claude settings first, then inherit them from the current default Anthropic-compatible provider. Config is fully isolated from your local CLI (~/.claude/).
developer.codeAgentConfigSaveFailed: Failed to save code agent configuration
developer.codeAgentFetchModelsRequiresConfig: Please fill in Base URL and API Key first
developer.codeAgentUsageProtocolDesc: How to parse token usage data from the model. Select OpenAI for GPT models, keep default for Anthropic models.
developer.codeAgentApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to use bundled Claude CLI auth
developer.codeAgentApiKeyDesc: If provided, the sidecar exports it as ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for Claude CLI runs.
developer.codeAgentAppendSystemPromptPlaceholder: Optional extra system instructions for Claude CLI.
developer.codeAgentPromptPlaceholder: Describe what you want the sidecar agent to inspect or do.
developer.codeAgentLatest: Run the sidecar manually against a local workspace for verification.
developer.codeAgentHealthCheckFailed: Failed to check code agent health
developer.codeAgentNoRun: No code agent run has been recorded yet.
developer.wsDiagnosticDesc: Temporarily enable WS/HTTP fallback chain for gateway RPC debugging.
developer.installDetail: This will create ~/.local/bin/openclaw. Ensure ~/.local/bin is on your PATH if you want to run it globally.
